# snapshot

Capture accessibility tree or diff against the previous session baseline

## Usage

```bash
agent-device snapshot [--diff] [-i] [-c] [-d <depth>] [-s <scope>] [--raw]
```

## Session Requirement

Usually expects an active session.

## Aliases

- None

## Notes

- None

## Allowed Flags

- `--diff`: Snapshot: show structural diff against the previous session baseline
- `-i`: Snapshot: interactive elements only
- `-c`: Snapshot: compact output (drop empty structure)
- `--depth, -d <depth>`: Snapshot: limit snapshot depth
- `--scope, -s <scope>`: Snapshot: scope snapshot to label/identifier
- `--raw`: Snapshot: raw node output

## Platform Coverage

| Target | Supported |
| --- | --- |
| iOS sim | Yes |
| iOS device | Yes |
| tvOS sim | Yes |
| macOS | Yes |
| Android emu | Yes |
| Android device | Yes |
| Android TV | Yes |
